title: Living Leaf Litter
description: This pack make the leaf litter living
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8759d05a1813f78e0e97187a254cdd4a3a837a20.png)
# 🌿 Living Leaf Litter — Description

This resource pack brings **leaf litter to life** by replacing the original dull texture with a **greener**, **more vibrant**, and **more natural-looking** version.  
Its goal is to enhance the atmosphere of forests and undergrowth while staying faithful to Minecraft’s visual style.
